20px 50px -22px rgba(14,60,90,.22);\u002d\u002dshadow-strong:0 30px 70px -20px rgba(14,60,90,.35);\u002d\u002dff-head:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;\u002d\u002dff-body:'Inter',sans-serif;\u002d\u002dgrad-main:linear-gradient(135deg,var(\u002d\u002dprimary) 0%,var(\u002d\u002dsecondary) 100%);\u002d\u002dgrad-accent:linear-gradient(135deg,var(\u002d\u002dprimary) 0%,var(\u002d\u002dsecondary) 100%)}\n.pharmacy-eyebrow{display:inline-flex!important;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-head);font-weight:700;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(\u002d\u002dprimary);background:rgba(14,116,144,.08);padding:8px 18px;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:20px;border:1px solid rgba(14,116,144,.15);width:max-content}.pharmacy-eyebrow:before{content:'';width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(\u002d\u002dsecondary);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(20,184,166,.18)}\n.pharmacy-section-title h2,.pharmacy-section-title{font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-head)!important;font-size:clamp(2rem,3.8vw,2.9rem)!important;font-weight:800!important;line-height:1.15!important;letter-spacing:-.02em!important;color:var(\u002d\u002ddark)!important;margin:0 0 16px!important}.pharmacy-section-desc{font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-body)!important;color:var(\u002d\u002dmuted)!important;font-size:1.08rem!important;line-height:1.7!important;max-width:680px}.pharmacy-outline-btn .et_pb_button,.pharmacy-outline-btn{background:transparent!important;color:var(\u002d\u002ddark)!important;border:1.5px solid var(\u002d\u002dline)!important;border-radius:100px!important;font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-head)!important;font-weight:700!important;padding:14px 26px!important;transition:.3s!important}.pharmacy-outline-btn:hover{border-color:var(\u002d\u002dprimary)!important;color:var(\u002d\u002dprimary)!important;transform:translateY(-3px)}\n.pharmacy-dot-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;background-image:radial-gradient(rgba(14,116,144,.16) 1.4px,transparent 1.4px);background-size:26px 26px;-webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(circle at center,#000 0%,transparent 70%);mask-image:radial-gradient(circle at center,#000 0%,transparent 70%)}\n\u003c/style\u003e\n\n\u003cstyle\u003e\n.pharmacy-services-native-section{position:relative!important;background:#fff!important;padding:60px 0!important;overflow:hidden!important}.pharmacy-services-native-section .et_pb_row{position:relative;z-index:2}.pharmacy-services-head-row{display:flex!important;align-items:flex-end!important;justify-content:space-between!important;gap:30px!important;max-width:1440px!important;width:100%!important}.pharmacy-services-head-left{width:70%!important}.pharmacy-services-head-right{display:flex!important;justify-content:flex-end!important;align-items:flex-end!important;width:30%!important}.pharmacy-services-cards-row{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)!important;gap:22px!important;max-width:1440px!important;width:100%!important;margin-top:54px!important}.pharmacy-service-card-col{position:relative!important;min-height:210px!important;background:rgba(255,255,255,.72)!important;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.6)!important;border-radius:24px!important;box-shadow:var(\u002d\u002dshadow-soft)!important;padding:30px!important;display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;justify-content:space-between!important;transition:transform .45s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1),box-shadow .45s!important;backdrop-filter:blur(18px)!important;overflow:hidden!important}.pharmacy-service-card-col:before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:inherit;padding:1.5px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(14,116,144,.5),rgba(20,184,166,0),rgba(37,99,235,.4));-webkit-mask:linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box,linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);-webkit-mask-composite:xor;mask-composite:exclude;opacity:0;transition:opacity .4s;pointer-events:none}.pharmacy-service-card-col:hover{transform:translateY(-8px);box-shadow:var(\u002d\u002dshadow-strong)!important}.pharmacy-service-card-col:hover:before{opacity:1}.pharmacy-service-card-wide{grid-column:span 2!important;grid-row:span 2!important;background:linear-gradient(150deg,#eefaf7,#f8fbfd)!important}.pharmacy-service-icon{width:56px!important;height:56px!important;border-radius:16px!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;background:var(\u002d\u002dgrad-main)!important;box-shadow:0 14px 26px -10px rgba(14,116,144,.4)!important;transition:transform .4s!important;margin-bottom:18px!important}.pharmacy-service-icon .et_pb_code_inner{display:flex!important}.pharmacy-service-icon svg{width:26px;height:26px;stroke:#fff}.pharmacy-service-card-col:hover .pharmacy-service-icon{transform:rotate(-8deg) scale(1.06)}.pharmacy-service-title,.pharmacy-service-title h3{font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-head)!important;font-size:1.14rem!important;line-height:1.3!important;font-weight:700!important;color:var(\u002d\u002ddark)!important;margin:0 0 8px!important}.pharmacy-service-card-wide .pharmacy-service-title,.pharmacy-service-card-wide .pharmacy-service-title h3{font-size:1.5rem!important}.pharmacy-service-text{font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-body)!important;font-size:.9rem!important;color:var(\u002d\u002dmuted)!important;line-height:1.6!important;margin-bottom:18px!important}.pharmacy-service-arrow{width:38px!important;height:38px!important;border-radius:50%!important;border:1.5px solid var(\u002d\u002dline)!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;transition:.35s!important;margin-top:auto!important}.pharmacy-service-arrow svg{width:16px;height:16px;stroke:var(\u002d\u002ddark);transition:.35s}.pharmacy-service-card-col:hover .pharmacy-service-arrow{background:var(\u002d\u002dgrad-main)!important;border-color:transparent!important}.pharmacy-service-card-col:hover .pharmacy-service-arrow svg{stroke:#fff;transform:translateX(3px)}@media(max-width:1100px){.pharmacy-services-head-row{display:block!important}.pharmacy-services-head-left,.pharmacy-services-head-right{width:100%!important}.pharmacy-services-head-right{justify-content:flex-start!important;margin-top:24px}.pharmacy-services-cards-row{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)!important}.pharmacy-service-card-wide{grid-column:span 2!important}}@media(max-width:720px){.pharmacy-services-native-section{padding:70px 0!important}.pharmacy-services-cards-row{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}.pharmacy-service-card-wide{grid-column:span class=\u0022pharmacy-dot-grid\u0022\u003e\u003c/div\u003e"}}},"builderVersion":"5.0.0-public-alpha.23","modulePreset":["default"]} /-->
